test-case.description: exposes the three collection groups
test-case.name: EndpointRegistry — structure.exposes the three collection groups

test-case.description: every security endpoint is Graph beta with required fields
test-case.name: EndpointRegistry — Partner Security Score (CSP scores).every security endpoint is Graph beta with required fields

test-case.description: includes customerInsights (all CSP customers in one call)
test-case.name: EndpointRegistry — Partner Security Score (CSP scores).includes customerInsights (all CSP customers in one call)

test-case.description: covers score, requirements and history
test-case.name: EndpointRegistry — Partner Security Score (CSP scores).covers score, requirements and history

test-case.description: does NOT reference the non-existent securityAlerts endpoint
test-case.name: EndpointRegistry — Partner Security Score (CSP scores).does NOT reference the non-existent securityAlerts endpoint

test-case.description: collects datasets and queries from the Insights surface
test-case.name: EndpointRegistry — Partner Insights catalog.collects datasets and queries from the Insights surface

test-case.description: every report definition names a dataset
test-case.name: EndpointRegistry — Partner Insights reports.every report definition names a dataset

test-case.description: seeds known datasets with Microsoft system query IDs
test-case.name: EndpointRegistry — Partner Insights reports.seeds known datasets with Microsoft system query IDs

test-case.description: includes all documented Partner Insights system queries
test-case.name: EndpointRegistry — Partner Insights reports.includes all documented Partner Insights system queries

test-case.description: parses CSV header + rows into objects
test-case.name: Convert-DelimitedToJson.parses CSV header + rows into objects

test-case.description: parses TSV using a tab delimiter
test-case.name: Convert-DelimitedToJson.parses TSV using a tab delimiter

test-case.description: returns an empty JSON array for empty content
test-case.name: Convert-DelimitedToJson.returns an empty JSON array for empty content

test-case.description: emits a JSON array even for a single row
test-case.name: Convert-DelimitedToJson.emits a JSON array even for a single row

test-case.description: honours the MaxRows truncation guard
test-case.name: Convert-DelimitedToJson.honours the MaxRows truncation guard

test-case.description: builds an explicit column projection with a timespan
test-case.name: New-DatasetSelectQuery.builds an explicit column projection with a timespan

test-case.description: omits TIMESPAN when the dataset publishes no available date ranges
test-case.name: New-DatasetSelectQuery.omits TIMESPAN when the dataset publishes no available date ranges

test-case.description: throws instead of generating an invalid SELECT wildcard
test-case.name: New-DatasetSelectQuery.throws instead of generating an invalid SELECT wildcard

test-suite.name: Partner Insights dataset recurrence and date ranges
test-suite.description: Partner Insights dataset recurrence and date ranges

test-case.description: clamps dataset minimum recurrence to the Partner Center allowed range
test-case.name: Partner Insights dataset recurrence and date ranges.clamps dataset minimum recurrence to the Partner Center allowed range

test-case.description: reads minimumRecurrenceInterval and availableDateRanges from dataset metadata
test-case.name: Partner Insights dataset recurrence and date ranges.reads minimumRecurrenceInterval and availableDateRanges from dataset metadata

test-case.description: returns no TIMESPAN for datasets without availableDateRanges
test-case.name: Partner Insights dataset recurrence and date ranges.returns no TIMESPAN for datasets without availableDateRanges

test-case.description: prefixes the dataset name deterministically (idempotent ensure key)
test-case.name: Get-InsightsReportName.prefixes the dataset name deterministically (idempotent ensure key)

test-case.description: builds names accepted by ScheduledQueries: alphanumerics and whitespace only
test-case.name: Get-InsightsQueryName.builds names accepted by ScheduledQueries: alphanumerics and whitespace only

test-case.description: reuses an existing report and returns its query id without creating anything
test-case.name: Register-InsightsReport.reuses an existing report and returns its query id without creating anything

test-case.description: throws when an HTTP 200 body carries an error statusCode
test-case.name: Partner Insights response envelopes.throws when an HTTP 200 body carries an error statusCode

test-case.description: allows successful response envelopes
test-case.name: Partner Insights response envelopes.allows successful response envelopes

test-case.description: reuses only Active reports
test-case.name: Partner Insights scheduled report reuse.reuses only Active reports

test-case.description: matches recreated report names by deterministic base prefix
test-case.name: Partner Insights scheduled report reuse.matches recreated report names by deterministic base prefix

test-case.description: extracts query projection columns
test-case.name: Partner Insights system query compatibility.extracts query projection columns

test-case.description: detects projected columns missing from the live dataset schema
test-case.name: Partner Insights system query compatibility.detects projected columns missing from the live dataset schema

test-suite.name: Insights dataset accessors (defensive across field spellings)
test-suite.description: Insights dataset accessors (defensive across field spellings)

test-case.description: reads the dataset name across spellings
test-case.name: Insights dataset accessors (defensive across field spellings).reads the dataset name across spellings

test-case.description: extracts columns from string arrays and object arrays
test-case.name: Insights dataset accessors (defensive across field spellings).extracts columns from string arrays and object arrays

test-case.description: keeps registry entries and adds auto reports for remaining datasets
test-case.name: Resolve-InsightsReportsToCollect.keeps registry entries and adds auto reports for remaining datasets

test-case.description: does not duplicate a dataset already covered by the registry
test-case.name: Resolve-InsightsReportsToCollect.does not duplicate a dataset already covered by the registry

test-case.description: skips registry-backed system queries when the dataset is absent from the partner catalog
test-case.name: Resolve-InsightsReportsToCollect.skips registry-backed system queries when the dataset is absent from the partner catalog

test-case.description: applies dataset minimum recurrence to registry-backed system query reports
test-case.name: Resolve-InsightsReportsToCollect.applies dataset minimum recurrence to registry-backed system query reports

test-case.description: falls back to generated query when a system query references missing live columns
test-case.name: Resolve-InsightsReportsToCollect.falls back to generated query when a system query references missing live columns

test-case.description: skips generated reports for datasets without selectableColumns
test-case.name: Resolve-InsightsReportsToCollect.skips generated reports for datasets without selectableColumns

test-case.description: ignores datasets when EnsureAllDatasets is disabled
test-case.name: Resolve-InsightsReportsToCollect.ignores datasets when EnsureAllDatasets is disabled

test-case.description: reads isMfaCompliant response headers case-insensitively
test-case.name: Partner Center MFA validation.reads isMfaCompliant response headers case-insensitively

test-case.description: throws when Partner Center reports a non-MFA-compliant token
test-case.name: Partner Center MFA validation.throws when Partner Center reports a non-MFA-compliant token

test-case.description: uses the delegated Partner Center scope for AppPlusUser
test-case.name: Get-ApiSurfaceTokenScope.uses the delegated Partner Center scope for AppPlusUser

test-case.description: uses the application .default scope for Partner Center AppOnly
test-case.name: Get-ApiSurfaceTokenScope.uses the application .default scope for Partner Center AppOnly

test-case.description: adds offline_access for the one-time authorization-code consent flow
test-case.name: Get-ApiSurfaceTokenScope.adds offline_access for the one-time authorization-code consent flow

test-case.description: exposes Microsoft Learn schema and system-query reference URLs
test-case.name: Partner Insights documentation references.exposes Microsoft Learn schema and system-query reference URLs

test-case.description: returns a three-part JWT string
test-case.name: TokenService — New-ClientAssertionJwt.returns a three-part JWT string

test-case.description: uses the RS256 header with an x5t thumbprint
test-case.name: TokenService — New-ClientAssertionJwt.uses the RS256 header with an x5t thumbprint

test-case.description: targets the tenant token endpoint as audience and the client as issuer/subject
test-case.name: TokenService — New-ClientAssertionJwt.targets the tenant token endpoint as audience and the client as issuer/subject

test-case.description: produces a signature verifiable with the certificate public key
test-case.name: TokenService — New-ClientAssertionJwt.produces a signature verifiable with the certificate public key
